title: HD 720P Backup Camera,Reverse Rear View Camera Fit for Audi A4L A5 A3 Q3 Q5 RS6 Fit for VW Passat Tiguan Jetta Sharan Touareg Lavida Skoda
features: 【Fitment】Car Rear View Camera Fit for Many VW and Audi Models---PLEASE CHECK THE SIZE OF YOUR TRUNK FOR CONFIRMATION TO SEE IF OUR CAMERA SIZE IS COMPATIBLE WITH YOUR TRUNK BEFORE PLACING ORDERS. This rearview camera can only work with a screen monitor with an RCA connector.

【High-Definition 720P Clarity】The 720P Trunk Handle Car Backup Camera fit for VW and AUDI.1280*720 resolution, vivid images with our AHD 720P camera, ensuring you get a clear view of everything behind your vehicle.no worry about blind spot area, IP68 waterproof, works properly under car washing or bad weather, fantastic night vision effect.

【Support AHD and CVBS】The vehicle rear view camera can work with both AHD monitors(AHD 720P 30HZ ONLY) and CVBS monitors. Its output video signal is CVBS by default. If you need it to connect with an AHD monitor, please cut the white cable on the camera and reconnect to the power supply. The AHD video signal image is much clearer than CVBS.

【Guideline Adjustable】Guideline on OR off can adjust, There is a small green switching loop on this reverse camera. When you get it, it is with guidelines by default. If you don't need the guidelines, please cut the green loop and reconnect to the power supply.

【Check】Firstly, please check if the camera size is compatible with your trunk size, and then please note that it only supports RCA connection, if your monitor does not support RCA, then NOT compatible. The compatible car models we listed are for reference only, please check carefully by yourself.
description: Product Description INSTALL Step 1：The right side of the bezel is held on with double-sided tape, and the left side has tape and /or a plastic clip. Use a little pressure heat to lift it away. Next, remove any of the remaining double-sided tape and clean the surface for your new camera handle bezel. Step 2：Fish your camera through the tailgate towards the bottom. Remember, you technically only need to tap into the reverse light if:1. You are only powering the camera off the reverse light or2. You need a reverse trigger wire Step 3：These wires are just pass-through​ wires so either end can be​ connected at the tail light or the​ radio. If just connecting at the reverse light, connect the red and purple (if a trigger is needed) to the light +, and black to the light-wire. Wire Connections: Red=Camera Power(either power at reverse light or radio location)Black = Ground Step 4：Next, we need to remove a few panels to give us space to run our wire through the floor, along kick panels, to the radio cavity in the dash. Step 5：Back camera inputs are usually a brown RCA input, but the color may vary depending on the brand of radio being installed. Step 6: You can connect to the power andground of the power socket forpower, or you can run a line toyour fuse box as well!
